title: gyptis lanigera
intro: Gyptis lanigera, also known as Sweet Vernal Grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its hairy leaves and delicate purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gyptis lanigera include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
